args.comment: Both auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) confirmed patched; patching-complete notice sent to security@arclight.example.

args.text: Credential rotation complete for CVE-2026-30117: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediating CVE-2026-30117, auth-api and session-store have been patched and credentials rotated. All staff sessions have been invalidated — please sign in again.

args.comment: Credentials rotated, staff notified, register updated. Remediation complete.
